message:
Fix flaky test ID generation causing unique constraint violations

Replace deterministic randHex() that used same timestamp for all chars
with proper crypto/rand implementation. This fixes test failures like
TestHistoryCommand_FilterByAgent where rapidly created requests
got identical IDs.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
